title: selaginella simplex
intro: Selaginella simplex, also known as the lesser spike moss or Japanese spike moss, is a species of spore-producing plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Selaginella simplex include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Selaginella simplex is often combined with other herbs and used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to maximize its medicinal properties.
